---
title: "Matyáš Levínský"
canonical-url: https://matyaslevinsky.github.io/
description: "Matyáš Levínský — researcher at PAQ Research working on housing, municipalities, and Czech public policy."
listing:
  - id: recent
    contents:
      - posts/publications
      - posts/projects
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="28%"}
<img src="data/GoodFoto-400w.webp"
     alt="Matyáš Levínský"
     width="400" height="600"
     style="width:100%; height:auto"
     fetchpriority="high">
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="67%"}
I am a sociologist and data analyst working at [PAQ Research](https://www.paqresearch.cz/). My work focuses on Czech municipal fragmentation, regional disparities and political structures. This includes everything from looking at municipal finances, electoral geography, housing policies to education outcomes. I studied urbanism at the Technical University in Berlin, and sociology at the Charles University in Prague.

This site is a collection of my publications, with some occasional projects that interested me in between.

[To my CV](cv.qmd)

<div class="d-flex gap-2 mt-3">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/matyaslevinsky/" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
<a href="https://github.com/matyasLevinsky" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100005920008245" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-facebook"></i> Facebook</a>
</div>
:::

::::

---

## What did I write?

::: {#recent}
:::
